content: Let me look into the critical activity and dig deeper into the schedule picture.
reasoning_content:
Let me dig deeper into the schedule activities. I can see there are 120 activities. The first one (MER-A-0001) has a status of "CRITICAL" - that's the procurement of CH-01 (PO-4500012301). Let me look at the critical ones and also check for any schedule-related risks in the documents.

Let me get the details on some of these activities and also investigate schedule-related information.

function.name: investigate
function.arguments: {"tasks": [{"focus": "Schedule delays and critical activities", "question": "List all activities with a non-empty status (CRITICAL, DELAYED, etc.), their links to POs, shipments, and any delay/risk notes. Also find any schedule-related documents."}, {"focus": "Procurement risks linked to critical schedule items", "question": "Find all POs and shipments linked to critical schedule activities and report their delivery status, delays, and value at risk."}]}
